title: Department Manager Vacancy at Pizza Hut India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Pizza Hut India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Pizza Hut India Asia Pacific Associates in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Pizza Hut India Asia Pacific Associates:
Pizza Hut India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pizza Hut India Asia Pacific Associates!
